decisions.scope: Synthetic governance fixtures only; no project content license is granted.

decisions.subject: code
decisions.scope: Museum-Codex project code excluding third-party components; public source visibility grants no permission to copy, modify, redistribute, or use commercially.
decisions.reason: Mays approved retention of all rights in project code without adding an open-source license.

decisions.subject: original_content
decisions.scope: Museum-Codex original curatorial prose, translations, relationship explanations, interface copy, and original design content; third-party metadata and media remain governed independently.
decisions.reason: Mays approved retention of all rights in original curatorial content while preserving independent third-party terms and attribution.
